conservative.description: Fewer parameters, wider steps. Lowest overfitting risk. Use for initial exploration.

parameters.name: stop_loss_atr_multiplier
parameters.description: Stop loss distance as multiple of ATR. Higher = wider stop = fewer stopped out but larger losses.

parameters.name: target_atr_multiplier
parameters.description: Target distance as multiple of ATR. Must be > stop_loss_atr_multiplier for positive RR.

parameters.name: min_confidence_filter
parameters.description: Minimum confidence level to take a trade. Higher = fewer but better trades.

parameters.name: signal_cooldown_bars
parameters.description: Minimum bars between signals for same index. Prevents overtrading.

moderate.description: Balanced parameter count. Good for strategy refinement after conservative pass.

parameters.name: stop_loss_atr_multiplier
parameters.description: Stop loss distance as multiple of ATR. Higher = wider stop = fewer stopped out but larger losses.

parameters.name: target_atr_multiplier
parameters.description: Target distance as multiple of ATR. Must be > stop_loss_atr_multiplier for positive RR.

parameters.name: min_confidence_filter
parameters.description: Minimum confidence level to take a trade. Higher = fewer but better trades.

parameters.name: signal_cooldown_bars
parameters.description: Minimum bars between signals for same index. Prevents overtrading.

parameters.name: risk_per_trade_pct
parameters.description: Maximum percentage of capital risked per trade.

parameters.name: trailing_sl_activation_pct
parameters.description: Move SL to breakeven when profit reaches this fraction of target distance.

parameters.name: max_positions
parameters.description: Maximum open positions at any time.

aggressive.description: Same 7 parameters as moderate but with finer step sizes. HIGH overfitting risk. Only use with 2+ years of data and walk-forward validation.

parameters.name: stop_loss_atr_multiplier
parameters.description: Stop loss distance as multiple of ATR. Higher = wider stop = fewer stopped out but larger losses.

parameters.name: target_atr_multiplier
parameters.description: Target distance as multiple of ATR. Must be > stop_loss_atr_multiplier for positive RR.

parameters.name: min_confidence_filter
parameters.description: Minimum confidence level to take a trade. Higher = fewer but better trades.

parameters.name: signal_cooldown_bars
parameters.description: Minimum bars between signals for same index. Prevents overtrading.

parameters.name: risk_per_trade_pct
parameters.description: Maximum percentage of capital risked per trade.

parameters.name: trailing_sl_activation_pct
parameters.description: Move SL to breakeven when profit reaches this fraction of target distance.

parameters.name: max_positions
parameters.description: Maximum open positions at any time.
